description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a deep green and black color scheme, reminiscent of military or tactical gear. The exterior is composed of multiple interlocking panels, providing both structural integrity and a futuristic aesthetic. The front is dominated by a large, dark visor that covers the face, flanked by small, circular details on each side that may serve as sensors or lights. The sides of the helmet are contoured and include subtle texturing, with the right side displaying the text 'UNSC' in white. The top of the helmet is smoothly contoured with raised ridges, enhancing both protection and style. The overall construction suggests a hard, impact-resistant shell with a likely padded interior for comfort and safety.
description: A futuristic, military-style helmet with a green and black color scheme, featuring a large dark visor and robust, angular paneling. The helmet includes subtle detailing and the text 'UNSC' on the side.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the layered green and black panels and the smooth, contoured shape.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, dark visor and small circular details on each side.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the 'UNSC' text and the helmet's angular structure.
description_view_3: Top view revealing the raised ridges and smooth, contoured surface of the helmet.
attribute_brand_logo: The helmet displays the text 'UNSC' in white on the right side, but no distinct brand logo or emblem is visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Solid green and black color scheme with the text 'UNSC' in white on the right side; no additional graphics or motifs.
